Bear Trap Planner

Planner by #1081 [ODY]P98 No account, no server, nothing shared
How to use this planner — 3 quick steps
1

Enter your troops

Type totals, or ＋ add each level — tiers show as badges like XI X VIII. Your highest tiers go to the Host Rally first.

2

Set marches & boosts

Enter Host and Joiner march sizes, tick your boosts (VALORA, Bison, Marshal, City Bonus). Get your Host ratio from Frakinator ↗ — Joiners default to the proven 1/10/89 split.

3

Send & share

Each row shows exactly what to send. OK = full march, Not enough troops = you're short. 📷 Export as JPG and drop it in alliance chat.

💾 Save each player as a preset — Export / Import moves them between devices 🛡 Keep at least 5,000 Infantry per joiner march — the default floor handles this for you 🔒 Everything auto-saves to this browser only — nothing leaves your device
Player Presets — save & switch players

Tip: drag any card by its title to move it, or drag its left/right edge to resize — your layout is remembered.
